name: RvD1 aged skeletal-muscle injury regeneration study
summary: Aged mice underwent barium-chloride tibialis anterior muscle injury and received daily systemic RvD1 or vehicle, with lipid mediator profiling, inflammation, fibrosis, regeneration, and force recovery assessed.
model_system: Aged female C57BL/6 mice, 26 to 28 months old, with induced skeletal-muscle injury and systemic RvD1 treatment
